case_title: RENITA WOODS VS. CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WOODS, RENITA AS TO DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODS, RENITA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODS, RENITA AS TO DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-20-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY WOODS, RENITA CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-24-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-24-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, RENITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST IN BRINGING A MEDICAL MALPRACTICE ACTION, THE PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE EXPERT TESTIMONY REGARDING THE STANDARD OF CARE, THAT THE STANDARD OF CARE WAS NOT MET, THAT THE FAILURE TO MEET THE STANDARD OF CARE CAUSED INJURY TO PLAINTIFF AND THE NATURE OF THE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE EXPERT TESTIMONY ON THE FIRST THREE OF THESE FACTORS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF WOODS, RENITA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
